title: Authorize Bloodshed
description: Harder and smarter enemies! Configure the defaults or keep it as is, it will make your gameplay more interesting.
body: ## Entity Modifiers This new feature allows for a high degree of customization for mobs. All modifiers are applied on mob spawn. Default settings will be established in a future update. - **Equipment Modifiers**: Add items to mobs' equipment slots. These items can have custom NBT, enchantments, or count. - **Attribute Modifiers**: Set an entity's attribute value. - **Effect Modifiers**: Add effects to mobs. ## AI Changes Several changes have been made to the AI of various mobs. ### General changes - **Endermen**: Endermen now chase slower or faster (configurable) when pursuing an enemy, allowing players to escape more effectively. - **Rabbits**: The speed at which rabbits panic (when avoiding a player or when hurt) can now be modified. - **Creepers**: Creepers now stay close when swelling up. If an enemy is getting far while swelling up, they sprint towards the enemy. ### Custom AI - **BuffNearbyRaiders AI Goal**: Witches now heal and buff nearby raiders with fire protection, regeneration, strength, etc. Their old HealNearbyRaiders AI goal has been completely replaced. - Raiders now run to witches for healing and protection potions when on low health. - **RunFromExplodingCreeper AI Goal**: A new AI goal has been added. Configurable values include enabling/disabling the goal and setting the creeper detection distance (for performance purposes).
